raw_responses.title: Augmented-GDA: LLM In-Loop Gradient Descent Algorithm (FLLM 2025)
raw_responses.snippet: Augmented-GDA controller separates decisions into static channel with validated menus and dynamic channel with free-form proposals checked by guardrails; matches strong static schedules on smooth benchmarks; reduces manual tuning; narrows dispersion.

raw_responses.title: Gradient Descent with Provably Tuned Learning-rate Schedules
raw_responses.snippet: Develops analytical tools for provably tuning hyperparameters in gradient-based algorithms applicable to non-convex non-smooth functions.

raw_responses.title: Optimal Learning Rate Schedule for Balancing Effort and Performance
raw_responses.snippet: Theoretical work on optimal LR schedules trading off training effort and final performance.

raw_responses.title: Why Linearly Decaying the LR to Zero (OpenReview)
raw_responses.snippet: Vanishing learning rate works best when gradient noise is the key factor slowing loss reduction.

raw_responses.title: Friction and Dynamics of Verge and Foliot (MDPI)
raw_responses.snippet: Source-domain analysis of verge-foliot friction dynamics; pendulum invention made clocks much more accurate.

raw_responses.title: Verge escapement (Wikipedia)
raw_responses.snippet: Earliest mechanical escapement; foliot's moment of inertia controls oscillation rate; period highly susceptible to drive-force variation because oscillator never detached from drive train.

raw_responses.title: Dynamics of the verge and foliot clock escapement (arXiv 2016, pre-2024)
raw_responses.snippet: Source-domain mechanical-dynamics paper from 2016 on verge-foliot dynamics.

raw_responses.title: Learning rate (Wikipedia)
raw_responses.snippet: General LR concepts: step size, schedules, decay, adaptive methods.
